name: Tuna with Madeira, Orange, and Soy
recipeIngredient: 4 Medallions of yellowfin tuna, 3-4 oz each
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 200°C (400°F).
2. Dust the tuna medallions with flour and shake off excess.
3. Heat oil in a large sauté pan over medium flame.
4. Fry the tuna for 2 minutes on each side until browned, then remove and keep warm in the oven.
5. Pour off any excess oil from the pan and return it to heat.
6. Combine the remaining ingredients (Madeira, orange juice, cream) in a saucepan and boil, reducing by half.
7. Remove from heat and stir in butter until just melted and blended into the sauce.
8. Place tuna medallions on plates and pour the sauce over them.
Serves 2.
